---
title: "User Guide"
---

## Getting Started

This guide explains how to use the IS428 VABITeam3 interactive dashboard.

## System Requirements

- Modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- Internet connection
- No installation required

## Accessing the Dashboard

## Accessing the Guide

<iframe src="G2T3 User Guide.pdf" width="100%" height="900px" style="border:none;"></iframe>
---
